reviews.comment:
Muy rapida atencion solo por la mañana de  12 a 14. Seta muy lleno

(Translated by Google)
Very fast service, but only in the morning from 12 to 2 pm. The mushroom shop is very crowded.

reviews.comment:
Pongo una estrella pero no pondría ninguna. Demoran mil años en cargar nafta. Llega a haber fila en la calle por la demora y es porque los playeros demoran una eternidad. PESIMO

(Translated by Google)
I'm giving it one star, but I wouldn't give it any. It takes forever to get gas. There's even a line in the street because of the delay, and that's because the attendants take an eternity. TERRIBLE.
